likely_answer_pattern: architecture comes from architectural drivers. NFRs/quality requirements are the main source; ASRs are the architecture-shaping subset; stakeholder concerns complete quality scenarios; organisations and technical environments constrain choices; business goals prioritize and resolve conflicts.
question_zh: 软件架构从哪里来？说明架构驱动因素和排序依据。
answer_zh: 软件架构来自会塑造结构和关键设计决定的架构驱动因素。第一，NFR/质量需求是最主要来源，说明系统必须达到的可用性、性能、可修改性、安全性等质量目标。第二，ASR 是这些需求、关键功能或强约束中对架构影响最大的少数需求。第三，利益相关者关注点需要通过工作坊或访谈补全，并写成可度量的质量属性场景。第四，组织因素会限制架构选择，包括团队能力、预算、进度、治理流程和责任边界。第五，技术/运行环境会限制可行方案，包括遗留系统、基础设施、平台、中间件、云环境和部署条件。最后，业务目标用于给这些驱动因素排序，并在冲突时做取舍。
sample_answer_zh: 软件架构来自架构驱动因素，也就是会迫使系统做出结构选择和关键设计决定的因素。最重要的是 NFR/质量需求，因为可用性、性能、可修改性、安全性等质量目标通常决定系统结构。质量需求、关键功能和强约束中，只有会显著影响结构、部署、通信、数据边界或技术选择的少数需求才是 ASR，应优先进入架构设计。需求文档常常写不清质量场景，所以要从利益相关者那里通过工作坊或访谈补充关注点，把“快、稳、安全”改写成可度量场景。组织因素如团队技能、预算、进度、治理和责任边界，会影响模块/服务拆分和交付方式。技术/运行环境如遗留系统、基础设施、数据库、中间件、云平台和部署环境，会限制可行方案。不同驱动因素冲突时，用业务目标判断优先级和取舍。
sample_answer_en: Software architecture comes from architectural drivers that shape structures and key decisions. First, NFRs/quality requirements are the main source because they define availability, performance, modifiability, security, and other quality goals. Second, ASRs are the small subset with the strongest architectural impact and must be handled early. Third, stakeholders provide concerns; workshops or interviews turn vague concerns into measurable quality scenarios. Fourth, organisations constrain architecture through team skills, cost, schedule, governance, and responsibility boundaries. Fifth, technical environments constrain feasible choices through legacy systems, infrastructure, databases, middleware, cloud platforms, and deployment. Business goals prioritize the drivers: high-value, high-risk, conflicting, and broadly impactful requirements should guide architecture first.

answer_points_zh: 总述：架构来自架构驱动因素，即会塑造结构和关键设计决定的因素。
NFR/质量需求：说明系统必须达到的质量目标，是最主要架构来源。
ASR：质量需求、关键功能或强约束中会显著影响架构的少数需求。
利益相关者关注点：通过工作坊/访谈补全，并转成质量属性场景。
组织因素：团队能力、预算、进度、治理和责任边界限制架构选择。
技术/运行环境：遗留系统、基础设施、平台、中间件、云环境和部署条件决定可行边界。
业务目标：用于排序、冲突解决和架构取舍。
answer_points_en: Start with architectural drivers: forces that shape structures and key decisions.
NFRs/quality requirements define quality goals and are the main architectural source.
ASRs are the subset of quality requirements, key functions, or strong constraints with significant architectural impact.
Stakeholder concerns are collected through workshops/interviews and turned into quality scenarios.
Organisations constrain choices through skills, cost, schedule, governance, and responsibility boundaries.
Technical environments constrain feasibility through legacy systems, infrastructure, platforms, middleware, cloud, and deployment.
Business goals prioritize drivers and resolve conflicts.

canonical_question: Explain the difference between architecture and design, and between architecture and structure.
source_paths: raw/zqx考试复习资料/【批量下载】18年等/体系结构2015年春季2班B卷.docx

likely_answer_pattern: Architecture is high-level design and a set of structures; all architecture is design but not all design is architecture; structure is elements, relations, and externally visible properties.
question_zh: 解释架构与设计、架构与结构的区别。
answer_zh: 所有架构都是设计的一部分，但并非所有设计都上升到架构层次；架构关注早期、高层、会影响质量属性和系统结构的重要设计决定。结构强调元素、关系和外部可见属性；架构使用一个或多个结构表达方案，并进一步服务 ASR、运行时依赖、通信和后续演化。
sample_answer_zh: 设计是更宽泛的设计活动；架构是其中高抽象、影响全局质量和后续实现的部分，所以所有架构都是设计，但不是所有设计都是架构。结构更偏“表达对象”：系统有哪些元素、元素之间有什么关系、外部可见属性是什么。架构会使用这些结构，但答题时还要说明它为什么这样组织：它要回应 ASR，协调运行时依赖、通信、部署和演化等关注点。因此结构可以看作架构的表示材料之一，架构是围绕重要设计决定形成的整体方案。
sample_answer_en: Design is broader; architecture is the high-level part of design that affects system-wide qualities and later implementation. Structure describes elements, relations, and externally visible properties. Architecture uses one or more structures, but also explains why they are organized this way to satisfy ASRs and to coordinate runtime dependencies, communication, deployment, and evolution.

canonical_question: Describe the difference and relationship between software requirements, quality attributes, and ASRs.

likely_answer_pattern: Requirements describe what the system must do and constraints; quality attributes are non-functional qualities; ASRs are requirements that significantly affect architectural decisions.
question_zh: 说明软件需求、质量属性和 ASR 的区别与关系。
answer_zh: 需求包含功能需求、质量需求和约束；质量属性描述系统“做得好不好”；ASR 是会显著影响架构设计决定的需求，常来自困难且重要的质量需求或关键约束。
sample_answer_zh: 软件需求是系统必须满足的全部要求，通常包括功能需求、质量需求和约束。功能需求说明系统要做什么，例如下单、支付、查询；质量属性说明系统做得好不好，例如性能、可用性、安全性和可修改性；约束是已经给定、必须遵守的设计决定，例如必须使用某数据库或满足法规。ASR 是架构攸关需求，是会显著影响架构设计决策的需求。重要且困难的质量需求、关键业务目标和强约束最容易成为 ASR。
sample_answer_en: Software requirements include functional requirements, quality requirements, and constraints. Quality attributes describe how well the system behaves. ASRs are requirements that significantly affect architectural decisions; hard and important qualities, business goals, and constraints often become ASRs.

priority_reason_en: The complete recording and review slides put this in the main focus; practice until you can answer in full paragraphs.

likely_answer_pattern: Name functional requirements, quality requirements, and constraints; explain that functional requirements state behavior/value, quality requirements state desired system characteristics, and constraints are pre-made design decisions.
question_zh: 哪些需求会影响架构设计决定？它们如何被规约？
answer_zh: 说明功能需求、质量需求和约束。功能需求给出行为和价值；质量需求给出系统特性，最好用场景化模板规约；约束是预先指定且必须接受的设计决定。
sample_answer_zh: 影响架构设计的需求主要有三类。第一类是功能需求，说明系统必须提供哪些行为和业务价值，通常用用例、用户故事或功能列表描述。第二类是质量需求，说明系统应具备的整体特性，例如性能、可用性、安全性，最好用质量属性场景描述，使其可测试。第三类是约束，表示预先确定的设计决定或外部限制，例如技术栈、部署环境、法规和组织规则。架构设计要同时满足这三类需求，并重点识别其中的 ASR。
sample_answer_en: Three kinds of requirements shape architecture: functional requirements, quality requirements, and constraints. Functions describe behavior and value, quality requirements should be specified by measurable scenarios, and constraints are pre-made decisions or external limits.

likely_answer_pattern: Draw or describe the six-part quality attribute scenario in the table order: source, stimulus, artifact, environment, response, response measure; provide requested attributes such as availability, performance, modifiability, or interoperability.
question_zh: 用 刺激-响应 形式建模质量属性场景。
answer_zh: 画出或描述六要素，并按重绘表格顺序背：刺激源、刺激、制品/工件、环境、响应、响应度量。按题目要求套入可用性、性能、可修改性、互操作性等质量属性。
sample_answer_zh: 质量属性场景用于把模糊质量需求改写成可测试的架构需求。完整场景包含六个部分：刺激源、刺激、制品/工件、环境、响应、响应度量。按六要素参考表中的 可用性 例子可直接写：刺激源是 心跳监视器；刺激是服务器无响应；制品是处理器；环境是正常操作；响应是通知操作者继续操作；响应度量是没有停机时间。答题时先画六列表，再把题目给出的可用性、性能、可修改性等需求填进去。
sample_answer_en: A quality attribute scenario turns a vague quality requirement into a testable architectural requirement. It has six parts: source of stimulus, stimulus, artifact, environment, response, and response measure. In the table's Availability example: the source is a heartbeat monitor; the stimulus is that the server does not respond; the artifact is the processor; the environment is normal operation; the response is to notify the operator and continue operation; and the response measure is no downtime.
visual_hint_zh: 直接照参考表画六列表；可用性 行以 心跳监视器、服务器无响应、处理器、正常操作、通知操作者继续操作、没有停机时间作为参考。
visual_hint_en: Draw the six-column reference table. For Availability, keep the ground-truth row: heartbeat monitor, server no response, processor, normal operation, notify operator and continue operation, no downtime.

priority_reason_en: The complete recording and review slides put this in the main focus; practice until you can answer in full paragraphs.

canonical_question: What are ASRs? List sources and methods for extracting and identifying ASRs.
source_paths: raw/zqx考试复习资料/张贺老师 体系结构 往年考题.md
data/extracted/raw/zqx考试复习资料/往年资料以及答案.txt

likely_answer_pattern: Define ASRs as requirements with strong architectural impact. Gather/identify them from requirement documents, stakeholder workshops/interviews or Quality Attribute Workshops (QAW), business goals, and utility-tree prioritization; scenarios are the measurable representation.
question_zh: 什么是 ASR？列出收集与识别 ASR 的来源和方法。
answer_zh: ASR 是对架构设计决定有显著影响的需求。识别来源/方法包括：1. 需求文档，先找功能需求、质量需求和约束；2. 利益相关者工作坊/访谈或质量属性工作坊（QAW），用来补全需求文档里没写清的质量关注点；3. 业务目标，用来判断哪些质量目标真正重要；4. 效用树，把候选 ASR 组织成质量属性、场景和度量，并按重要性和实现难度排序。约束和质量属性场景是重要输入/表达形式。
sample_answer_zh: ASR 不是所有需求，而是会强烈影响架构结构、模式、技术选择和质量取舍的需求。识别时先读需求文档，找功能需求、质量需求和约束；再通过利益相关者工作坊/访谈或质量属性工作坊（QAW）补全需求文档里没有写清的质量关注点；同时用业务目标判断哪些质量目标真正重要；最后把候选 ASR 写成质量属性场景，并放入效用树做重要性和实现难度排序。优先处理业务价值高、技术风险高、冲突多、影响范围大的叶节点。
sample_answer_en: An ASR is not every requirement, but a requirement that strongly affects architectural structures, patterns, technology choices, and quality tradeoffs. Identify ASRs by first reading requirement documents for functional requirements, quality requirements, and constraints; then using stakeholder workshops/interviews or Quality Attribute Workshops (QAW) to recover missing quality concerns; using business goals to judge which qualities matter most; and finally expressing candidate ASRs as quality-attribute scenarios in a utility tree, prioritized by importance and implementation difficulty. High business value, high technical risk, many conflicts, and broad impact make a leaf a stronger ASR candidate.
visual_hint_zh: 画 效用树 时别只写名词，叶子必须落到可测试场景。
visual_hint_en: Draw the utility tree with testable scenario leaves rather than noun-only labels.

drawing_steps_zh: 根节点写“系统效用 / 业务目标”。
第二层写质量属性，例如可用性、性能、可修改性、安全性。
每个质量属性下面写 1-2 个质量属性场景，场景要包含刺激、环境、响应和响应度量。
在叶节点旁标重要性和实现难度，例如 H/H、H/M、M/L。
圈出业务价值高且技术风险高的叶节点，说明这些优先成为 ASR。
drawing_steps_en: Write System Utility / Business Goal at the root.
Add quality attributes on the second level, such as availability, performance, modifiability, and security.
Under each quality attribute, write 1-2 quality-attribute scenarios with stimulus, environment, response, and response measure.
Mark importance and implementation difficulty beside leaves, such as H/H, H/M, or M/L.
Circle leaves with high business value and high technical risk, and state that they become priority ASRs.

likely_answer_pattern: Risk is a potential negative outcome where an architectural decision may cause a quality goal to fail; a sensitivity point is a decision or parameter where a small change significantly affects one quality attribute; a trade-off point affects multiple quality attributes in opposite directions.
question_zh: 定义 风险、敏感点和权衡点，并举例。
answer_zh: 风险是某个架构决定可能导致质量目标无法满足的潜在问题；敏感点是某个设计参数或决定的小变化会显著影响某个质量属性；权衡点是一个决定同时影响多个质量属性且影响方向可能相反。
sample_answer_zh: 风险是某个架构决定可能导致质量目标无法满足的潜在负面结果，例如只部署一个数据库节点会带来可用性风险。敏感点是某个参数或设计决定的小变化会明显影响质量属性，例如缓存大小会显著影响性能。权衡点是一个决定同时影响多个质量属性，而且影响方向可能相反，例如分层架构提高可修改性和可维护性，但额外层次调用可能降低性能。
sample_answer_en: Risk is a potential negative outcome where an architectural decision may cause a quality goal to fail, for example deploying only one database node creates availability risk. A sensitivity point is a parameter or design decision whose small change clearly affects one quality attribute, for example cache size strongly affects performance. A tradeoff point is a decision that affects multiple quality attributes, possibly in opposite directions, for example layering improves modifiability and maintainability but extra layer calls may reduce performance.

敏感点：小变化会显著影响某个质量属性的参数或设计决定。

Sensitivity point: a parameter or design decision where a small change strongly affects one quality attribute.
Tradeoff point: one decision affects multiple quality attributes, possibly improving one while hurting another.

question_zh: 简述软件架构过程的一般活动，包括输入和输出。
answer_zh: 按架构过程答四个早期架构活动：1. 规约 ASR：把利益相关者关注点、需求、约束和业务目标整理成可度量、可排序的质量场景；2. 架构设计：用需求、约束、模式和战术形成候选视图；3. 文档化：记录选定并合并后的视图、接口、映射、约束和设计理由；4. 架构评估：用场景检查架构并识别风险、敏感点、权衡点和下一轮反馈。
sample_answer_zh: 本课程的软件架构过程可以按四个早期活动作答。第一步是规约 ASR，把利益相关者关注点、需求、约束和业务目标转成有优先级、可度量的质量场景。第二步是架构设计，依据需求和约束，选择模式与战术，形成候选视图。第三步是文档化，记录选定并合并后的视图，以及接口、映射、设计理由、约束等视图外信息。第四步是架构评估，用质量场景检查架构方案，识别风险、敏感点、权衡点，并把结果反馈给下一轮设计。
sample_answer_en: For this course, answer with four early architecture activities. First, specify ASRs by turning stakeholder concerns, requirements, constraints, and business goals into prioritized measurable quality scenarios. Second, perform architecture design using requirements, constraints, patterns, and tactics to form candidate views. Third, document the chosen and combined views plus beyond-view information such as interfaces, mappings, rationale, and constraints. Fourth, evaluate the architecture against scenarios to identify risks, sensitivity points, tradeoff points, and feedback for the next design iteration.

question_zh: 描述属性驱动设计（ADD）3.0 的输入、七步流程和迭代关系。
answer_zh: 按 第 12 讲 的 ADD 3.0 七步答：1. 审查输入；2. 通过选择驱动因素建立迭代目标；3. 选择一个或多个要细化的系统元素；4. 选择能满足所选驱动因素的设计概念；5. 实例化架构元素、分配职责并定义接口；6. 绘制视图草图并记录设计决定；7. 分析当前设计，并检查迭代目标和设计目的是否达成。若目标尚未满足，则从第 7 步回到第 2 步继续迭代。
sample_answer_zh: ADD 3.0 是一种按驱动因素迭代推进的软件架构设计方法。输入包括设计目的、主要功能、质量属性场景、架构关注点、约束和既有架构。每一轮先审查输入，再选择本轮最重要的驱动因素形成迭代目标；接着选择要细化的系统元素，选择合适的设计概念，例如风格、模式、战术或外部组件；然后实例化架构元素、分配职责、定义接口；再画出相关视图并记录设计决定；最后分析当前设计是否达成本轮目标和设计目的。若没有达成，就回到选择驱动因素这一步继续迭代。
sample_answer_en: ADD 3.0 is an iterative, attribute-driven architecture design method. First, review the inputs and check that drivers such as Design Purpose, Primary Functionality, Quality Attributes, Architectural Concerns, and Constraints are available; previous-iteration or brownfield designs can also flow into this step. Then establish the iteration goal by selecting drivers, choose one or more system elements to refine, choose design concepts that satisfy the selected drivers, instantiate architectural elements, allocate responsibilities and define interfaces, sketch views and record design decisions/rationale, and finally analyze the current design and review the iteration goal and achievement of the design purpose. If key driving requirements or risks remain, return to Step 2 for another iteration until a refined software architecture design is produced.

Step 5: instantiate architectural elements, allocate responsibilities, and define interfaces.
Step 6: sketch views and record design decisions/rationale.
Step 7: analyze the current design and review whether the iteration goal and design purpose are achieved; if necessary, iterate back to Step 2.

question_zh: 描述 ATAM 每个阶段会产生哪些输出。
answer_zh: 第 0 阶段产生评估计划；第 1 阶段产生业务目标、架构陈述、效用树、场景、风险/非风险、敏感点/权衡点；第 2 阶段产生 利益相关者场景和风险主题；第 3 阶段产生最终报告。
sample_answer_zh: ATAM 的输出按阶段组织。第 0 阶段是准备阶段，输出 评估计划，包括参与者、时间、范围和报告对象。第 1 阶段 面向项目决策者，输出 业务驱动因素、架构说明、效用树、优先质量场景、风险/非风险、敏感点和权衡点。第 2 阶段引入更广泛的利益相关者，输出新增/合并后的 利益相关者场景、优先场景列表和 风险主题。第 3 阶段输出 最终报告，汇总场景、风险、敏感点、权衡点和风险主题。
sample_answer_en: ATAM outputs are phase-based: Phase 0 produces the evaluation plan. Phase 1 produces business drivers, an architecture presentation, a utility tree, prioritized scenarios, risks/non-risks, sensitivity points, and tradeoff points. Phase 2 adds broader stakeholder scenarios, merged/prioritized scenario lists, and risk themes. Phase 3 produces the final report.

likely_answer_pattern: Explain roles for evaluation team leadership, project decision makers, project manager/customer, lead architect, and broader stakeholders; tie each role to scenario generation, prioritization, architecture presentation, and risk analysis.
question_zh: 描述 ATAM 过程中有哪些 利益相关者 及其职责。
answer_zh: 说明评估团队、项目决策者、项目经理/客户、首席架构师和更广泛 利益相关者 的角色：介绍业务驱动、陈述架构、提出场景、排序优先级、分析风险并确认结果。
sample_answer_zh: ATAM 中至少要说明几类角色。评估团队负责组织评估、介绍 ATAM 方法、引导场景生成、记录风险并形成报告。项目决策者/管理者说明 业务驱动因素、范围和评估目标。首席架构师陈述当前架构、关键设计决定和理由。更广泛的利益相关者 在 第 2 阶段 参与，例如用户、测试、运维、维护、安全或业务代表，他们提出并排序场景，帮助确认风险主题。这些人员是典型例子，考场表述重点放在角色如何提供业务目标、架构信息、场景和风险验证。
sample_answer_en: Explain ATAM roles rather than a fixed exhaustive list. The evaluation team organizes the evaluation, presents the method, elicits scenarios, records risks, and writes the report. Project decision makers/managers provide business drivers, scope, and evaluation goals. The lead architect presents the architecture and key rationale. Broader stakeholders in Phase 2, such as users, testers, operators, maintainers, security, or business representatives, propose and prioritize scenarios and help validate risk themes.
priority_reason_zh: 非 核心考点的补充掌握；理解到能识别和简答即可。
priority_reason_en: Appears in historical papers or auxiliary sources, but the complete recording does not promote it to a 2026 focus; keep it as backup.
source_audit_zh: 补充资料支持角色题，但具体人员名单不应绝对化；答案改成角色职责，测试/运维/安全等仅为 第 2 阶段 更广泛的利益相关者示例。
source_audit_en: Old-paper grounded; concrete stakeholder lists are examples. The answer focuses on roles and responsibilities.

likely_answer_pattern: Map implementation units to module styles, runtime behavior/interactions to C&C styles, and non-software environment relation to allocation styles; list examples for each category.
question_zh: 把架构问题映射到风格/视图类别，并为每类列出典型视图。
answer_zh: 实现单元相关问题映射到模块风格/模块视图；运行时交互相关问题映射到组件-连接器风格/组件-连接器视图；软件到非软件环境的映射问题对应分配风格/分配视图。典型例子：模块类包括分解、使用、分层、泛化；组件-连接器类包括客户端-服务器、管道-过滤器、发布-订阅、SOA；分配类包括部署、安装、工作分配、多层部署。
sample_answer_zh: 先看问题关心什么元素和关系。如果题目问“系统如何被组织成实现单元”，应使用模块视图，常见例子有分解视图、使用视图、分层视图、泛化视图。如果题目问“系统运行时组件如何交互”，应使用组件-连接器视图，常见例子有客户端-服务器、管道-过滤器、发布-订阅、SOA。如果题目问“软件如何映射到非软件环境”，应使用分配视图，常见例子有部署视图、安装视图、工作分配视图、多层部署视图。这样可以避免把所有架构问题都画成同一种 UML 图。
sample_answer_en: First ask what elements and relations the question cares about. If it asks how the system is organized into implementation units, use module views such as decomposition, uses, layered, and generalization views. If it asks how runtime components interact, use component-and-connector views such as client-server, pipe-and-filter, publish-subscribe, and SOA. If it asks how software maps to the non-software environment, use allocation views such as deployment, install, work assignment, and multi-tier deployment. This prevents turning every architecture question into the same UML diagram.
visual_hint_zh: 考场可画“最小视图 + 选择三步 + 视图外 信息”三块，不必画完整文档模板。
visual_hint_en: In the exam, draw three blocks: minimum views, three-step selection, and beyond-view information; no need for a full template.

模块下写分解、使用、分层、泛化；组件-连接器下写客户端-服务器、管道-过滤器、发布-订阅/SOA；分配下写部署、安装、工作分配、多层部署。

Under Module write decomposition, uses, layered, and generalization; under C&C write client-server, pipe-and-filter, publish-subscribe, and SOA; under Allocation write deployment, install, work assignment, and multi-tier deployment.
Conclude that different concerns need different views; do not draw every answer as one UML diagram.

组件-连接器视图：回答运行时组件、连接器、数据流和交互。

answer_points_en: Module views answer implementation units, code organization, responsibilities, and dependencies.
Component-and-Connector views answer runtime components, connectors, data flow, and interactions.
Allocation views answer mappings from software elements to hardware, runtime environments, teams, or file systems.

likely_answer_pattern: Different views serve different stakeholders/goals, highlight different elements/relations, and expose different quality attributes; name module, C&C, allocation, and quality or 4+1 views with purposes.
question_zh: 为什么软件架构要用不同视图文档化？给出四个示例视图及其目的。
answer_zh: 不同视图服务不同利益相关者和关注点，突出不同元素和关系，也帮助分析不同质量属性。可列模块视图、组件-连接器视图、分配视图，或 4+1 中的逻辑视图、进程视图、物理视图、开发视图。
sample_answer_zh: 软件架构需要用不同视图文档化，因为不同利益相关者关心不同问题，单一视图无法同时表达实现结构、运行时交互、部署环境和质量属性。开发者关心模块分解和依赖关系，运维人员关心部署视图，测试人员关心接口和质量场景，项目经理关心工作分配和风险。示例视图包括：模块视图 表示实现单元和依赖；组件-连接器视图 表示运行时组件和连接器；部署视图 表示软件到硬件节点的映射；质量视图 表示性能、安全、可靠性等质量关注点。
sample_answer_en: Architecture should be documented using different views because different stakeholders care about different questions, and one view cannot show implementation structure, runtime interaction, deployment environment, and quality concerns at the same time. Developers need module decomposition and dependencies; operators need deployment views; testers need interfaces and quality scenarios; project managers need work assignment and risk information. Example views: a module view shows implementation units and dependencies; a Component-and-Connector view shows runtime components and connectors; a deployment view maps software to hardware nodes; a quality view highlights concerns such as performance, security, and reliability.

likely_answer_pattern: Include architecture overview, views and view descriptions, beyond-view documentation, mapping between views, rationale/decisions, interface definitions, quality attributes, deployment/configuration notes.
question_zh: 典型软件架构文档包应包含哪些内容？
answer_zh: 典型架构文档包包含视图和视图外信息。视图部分记录选定架构视图，每个视图应有主表示图、元素目录、关系、接口、行为、上下文和设计理由。视图外信息记录文档路线图、系统概述、业务目标、架构驱动因素、跨视图映射、重要设计决定、约束、术语表和索引。
sample_answer_zh: 典型架构文档包应包含视图和视图外信息两部分。视图部分记录选定的架构视图，每个视图应有主表示图、元素说明、关系说明、接口、行为、上下文图和设计理由。视图外信息记录跨视图信息，包括文档路线图、系统概述、业务目标、架构驱动因素、视图之间的映射、重要设计决定、约束、术语表和索引。这样文档不仅说明“架构长什么样”，还说明“为什么这样设计”和“不同视图如何对应”。
sample_answer_en: An architecture documentation package has views and beyond-view information. Each view includes primary presentation, element catalog, relations, interfaces, behavior, context, and rationale. Beyond-view information includes roadmap, overview, drivers, view mappings, decisions, constraints, glossary, and index.

likely_answer_pattern: List logical, process, physical/deployment, development/implementation, plus scenarios/use cases; explain the purpose of each.
question_zh: 描述 Kruchten 的 4+1 视图。
answer_zh: 4+1 包括逻辑视图、进程视图、物理视图、开发视图，加上用例/场景。逻辑视图说明主要功能和领域对象；进程视图说明并发、进程、线程和通信；开发视图说明代码模块和开发组织；物理视图说明软件到硬件/部署环境的映射；场景用于串联和验证前四个视图。
sample_answer_zh: Kruchten 的 4+1 视图用五类视角描述架构。逻辑视图 描述系统提供给用户的主要功能和领域对象；进程视图 描述运行时进程、线程、并发和通信；开发视图 描述代码模块、包和开发组织；物理视图 描述软件如何部署到硬件节点；“+1” 是场景或用例，用来串联和验证前四个视图。它的价值在于用不同视角服务不同利益相关者，并用场景检查视图之间是否一致。
sample_answer_en: Kruchten 4+1 includes logical, process, development, physical, plus scenarios/use cases. Logical covers functionality/domain objects, process covers runtime concurrency/communication, development covers modules/packages, physical covers deployment, and scenarios validate the other views.

likely_answer_pattern: Tactics are fine-grained design decisions for one quality driver; patterns/styles package larger recurring structures and often combine multiple tactics. Use examples only as examples, not as an exhaustive source list.
question_zh: 说明架构模式与战术的关系，并列举战术及用途。
answer_zh: 战术是面向某个质量属性响应的较小设计动作；模式/风格是更大粒度、可复用的结构方案，常把多个战术和约束组合起来。例子：可用性可用心跳检测、冗余、故障转移；性能可用缓存、负载均衡、控制资源需求；可修改性可用提高内聚、限制依赖、隐藏信息；安全性可用认证、授权、记录。
sample_answer_zh: 战术和模式的区别在粒度。战术通常针对一个质量属性的某个响应点，是较原子的设计动作；模式/风格解决反复出现的一类架构问题，会规定元素、连接关系、约束和质量取舍，往往组合多个战术。例如为了可用性，可以用心跳检测发现故障，用冗余和故障转移支持恢复；这些战术组合到具体系统里，可能成为代理模式、客户端-服务器或微服务结构的一部分。答题按“粒度、作用、例子、取舍”展开即可。
sample_answer_en: Tactics and patterns differ in granularity. A tactic is a fine-grained design action for a quality-attribute response; a pattern/style is a larger reusable architectural solution that defines elements, relations, constraints, and quality tradeoffs, often combining several tactics. Availability tactics include heartbeat detection, redundancy, and failover; performance tactics include caching, load balancing, and controlling resource demand; modifiability tactics include increasing cohesion, limiting dependencies, and hiding information; security tactics include authentication, authorization, and auditing/logging. In a concrete system, these tactics may be packaged inside a larger Broker, client-server, layered, SOA, or microservice structure. Answer by granularity, purpose, examples, and tradeoffs.

answer_points_zh: 战术：解决质量属性响应的原子设计动作。

answer_points_en: Tactic: an atomic design action for a quality-attribute response.
Pattern/style: a structural solution for a recurring architecture problem.
Relationship: patterns/styles often combine multiple tactics and impose constraints and tradeoffs.

Examples: heartbeat/redundancy/failover for availability; caching/load balancing for performance; cohesion/dependency control/information hiding for modifiability; authentication/authorization/logging for security.

likely_answer_pattern: Use the source-backed generic strategies: abstraction, decomposition, generate-and-test, iteration/refinement, and reuse. Treat layering, SOA, plugins, etc. as design concepts or architectural styles, not the core generic-strategy list.
question_zh: 软件设计中有哪些通用设计策略？给出架构例子。
answer_zh: 通用设计策略优先背五个有据可查的词：抽象、分解、生成-测试、迭代/细化、复用。分层、SOA、插件化、组件化等可以作为这些策略落到架构上的例子或设计概念，不要和通用策略清单混在一起当作同级必答。
sample_answer_zh: 软件设计的通用策略可以这样答：抽象 用抽象隐藏实现细节，让架构师先关注组件、连接件或模块；分解 把系统或模块按关注点拆开；生成并测试 先提出候选方案，再用质量属性场景和约束评估；迭代/细化 通过多轮设计逐步细化，ADD 就是典型迭代方法；复用 复用既有架构、模式、框架或组件来降低风险。分层、SOA、插件化等可以写成这些策略的应用例子，而不是把它们并列成“通用策略”。
sample_answer_en: Source-backed generic design strategies are abstraction, decomposition, generate-and-test, iteration/refinement, and reuse. Abstraction hides implementation detail; decomposition separates concerns; generate-and-test creates and evaluates alternatives; iteration/refinement gradually improves the design, as in ADD; reuse lowers risk by using existing architectures, patterns, frameworks, or components. Layering, SOA, and plugins are applications or design concepts, not the core generic-strategy list.

likely_answer_pattern: Explain C&C as runtime components and connectors; MVC has model data/state, view UI, controller mediating user input and model/view updates, connected through calls/events/notifications.
question_zh: 组件-连接器 风格 的本质是什么？用 MVC 举例。
answer_zh: 组件-连接器风格描述运行时组件与连接器。MVC 中模型保存数据和状态，视图展示界面，控制器处理用户输入并协调模型与视图；连接方式可为调用、事件或通知。
sample_answer_zh: 组件-连接器风格关注运行时元素及其交互方式，而不是代码目录结构。组件是运行时执行计算或保存状态的单元，连接器是组件之间调用、事件、消息或数据流的交互机制。MVC 是典型例子：模型保存业务数据和状态，视图负责用户界面展示，控制器接收用户输入并协调模型与视图。它通过调用和通知关系把三者连接起来，使界面展示、用户输入和业务状态变化相对分离。
sample_answer_en: C&C style focuses on runtime elements and interactions, not code folders. Components compute or hold state, while connectors are calls/events/messages/streams. In MVC, Model holds data/state, View presents UI, Controller handles input and coordinates Model/View through calls and notifications.
visual_hint_zh: MVC 图只作为 C&C 例子，重点是运行时组件和连接件，不是类图。
visual_hint_en: Use MVC only as a C&C example; focus on runtime components and connectors, not class diagrams.

likely_answer_pattern: Broker mediates communication between clients and servers; benefits are extensibility/reuse/dynamic server changes; limits are latency, bottleneck, single point of failure, complexity, security target, test difficulty.
question_zh: 解释 代理模式 架构 模式 的上下文、好处和局限。
answer_zh: 代理模式在客户端与服务端之间加入中介通信。优点是可扩展、复用、动态替换服务端；局限是延迟、瓶颈、单点故障、复杂度、安全攻击面和测试困难。
sample_answer_zh: 代理模式 模式适用于由多个远程对象或服务组成、需要解耦客户端和服务端通信的分布式系统。代理模式 作为中介，负责服务注册、查找、请求转发、结果返回和可能的协议适配。好处是客户端不需要知道服务端位置和实现，服务可以动态替换或扩展，系统互操作性和可扩展性更好。局限是 代理模式 增加了间接层和复杂度，可能带来延迟、瓶颈、单点故障、安全攻击面和测试困难。
sample_answer_en: The Broker pattern mediates between clients and servers in distributed systems. It supports registration, lookup, request forwarding, response return, and protocol adaptation. Benefits are location transparency, extensibility, and interoperability; limits are latency, bottleneck, single point of failure, security, and testing complexity.
visual_hint_zh: 代理模式题画出 Client、Broker、Server 的拓扑和转发关系即可。
visual_hint_en: Broker is a historical pattern question; draw the topology but do not promote it to the core focus.

likely_answer_pattern: Layered style groups modules into layers with an allowed-to-use relation; benefits are separation and reuse; limitations are complexity, performance penalty, poor abstractions, and layer bridging.
question_zh: 解释 分层 架构 风格 的上下文、好处和局限。
answer_zh: 分层架构把模块按抽象级别组织，并限制允许使用关系。上层通过下层提供的服务完成工作，下层不应依赖上层。优点是关注点分离、复用、可替换、可修改；局限是层次过多会增加复杂性和性能开销，跨层调用会破坏约束，抽象不良会阻碍演化。
sample_answer_zh: 分层架构把系统组织成若干抽象层，每一层为上层提供服务，并依赖下层完成更基础的能力。它适合复杂系统的关注点分离，例如表示层、业务层、数据访问层。优点是结构清晰、职责分离、可替换性和可维护性较好，也便于复用底层服务。局限是层数过多会增加复杂度和性能开销；如果上层频繁绕过中间层直接访问底层，会破坏分层约束；如果层的抽象设计不合理，反而会阻碍演化。
sample_answer_en: Layered architecture organizes a system into abstraction layers with allowed-to-use relations. It improves separation, modifiability, replaceability, and reuse. Limits include extra complexity, performance cost, layer bridging, and poor abstractions that block evolution.

likely_answer_pattern: Layered emphasizes logical separation and allowed-to-use dependencies; multi-tier emphasizes deployment/distribution of tiers across processes or machines.
question_zh: 说明 分层 模式 与 多层部署 模式 的区别。
answer_zh: 分层 强调逻辑分离和层间依赖规则，是 模块 风格；多层部署 强调把 部署层 部署到不同进程/机器/环境，是 分配/部署 视角。
sample_answer_zh: 分层 模式 和 多层部署 模式 的核心区别在关注点。分层 是 模块 风格，强调逻辑职责和允许使用关系，例如 表示层/界面层、业务层、数据层，即使它们部署在同一进程中也仍然是分层。多层部署 是 分配 风格，强调软件单元如何分布到不同进程、机器或网络节点上，例如浏览器、应用服务器、数据库服务器三层部署。简单说，分层 回答“代码和职责如何分层”，多层部署 回答“系统如何部署和分布”。
sample_answer_en: Layered is a module style about logical responsibilities and allowed-to-use relations. Multi-tier is an allocation style about distributing software across processes, machines, or network nodes. Layered answers how code/responsibilities are separated; multi-tier answers how the system is deployed.

likely_answer_pattern: State explicit boundaries, autonomous services, shared schemas/contracts not implementations, policy-based compatibility; discuss interoperability, scalability/performance, and security tradeoffs.
question_zh: 描述 SOA 原则及其对质量属性的影响。
answer_zh: 说明显式边界、服务自治、共享 模式/契约 而非实现、策略兼容。再讨论对互操作性、可伸缩性/性能、安全性的正负影响。
sample_answer_zh: SOA 的基本思想是把业务能力封装成自治服务，通过明确服务契约对外提供能力。核心原则包括服务契约、服务封装、服务复用、服务组合、服务自治和尽量无状态。SOA 提高互操作性，因为异构系统可以通过标准契约和消息协议集成；也有利于可伸缩性，因为服务之间松耦合，可以独立扩展和组合。但 SOA 也会引入分布式复杂度，中间件可能成为性能瓶颈或攻击目标，多服务调用也会增加安全治理、追踪和故障定位难度。
sample_answer_en: SOA encapsulates business capabilities as autonomous services with explicit contracts. It improves interoperability and potential scalability through loose coupling and standard contracts, but adds distributed complexity, middleware bottlenecks, security governance, tracing, and fault diagnosis challenges.
visual_hint_zh: SOA 图用于理解质量影响；答题时注意和微服务、DDD、ASR 等内容区分。

likely_answer_pattern: SOA is architectural principle/style; Web Service is integration/implementation technology; ESB is middleware infrastructure that can support SOA, often using Web Services but not equivalent to SOA.
question_zh: 说明 SOA、Web 服务 和 ESB 的目的、区别与关系。
answer_zh: SOA 是架构原则/风格；Web 服务 是集成实现技术；ESB 是支持 SOA 的中间件基础设施，常使用 Web 服务，但三者不能等同。
sample_answer_zh: SOA 是一种架构风格或设计原则，目标是把业务功能组织成可组合、可复用的服务。Web 服务 是实现服务互操作的一组技术标准，例如 SOAP、WSDL 或 HTTP 相关协议，它可以用来实现 SOA，但不等于 SOA。ESB 是企业服务总线，是一种中间件基础设施，提供消息路由、协议转换、服务编排和集成能力。三者关系是：SOA 定义架构思想，Web 服务 提供实现技术，ESB 提供支撑 SOA 集成的基础设施。
sample_answer_en: SOA is an architectural style/principle. Web Service is an implementation technology for interoperable services, such as SOAP/WSDL/HTTP. ESB is middleware infrastructure for routing, protocol translation, orchestration, and integration. SOA is the idea, Web Service is a technology, ESB is supporting infrastructure.

likely_answer_pattern: Both are service-oriented, modular, distributed, and loosely coupled; microservices are smaller, independently deployed/owned, often lightweight protocol and service-owned data; SOA may use larger enterprise services and ESB governance.
question_zh: 比较微服务与 SOA。
answer_zh: 相同点：服务化、模块化、分布式、松耦合。不同点：微服务粒度更小、独立部署/团队拥有、轻量协议、服务自有数据；SOA 往往服务更大、治理更集中、可能依赖 ESB 和全局数据模型。
sample_answer_zh: 微服务和 SOA 都强调服务化、分布式、松耦合和复用，但粒度和治理方式不同。SOA 往往面向企业级集成，服务粒度较大，治理更集中，可能借助 ESB、服务注册表、编排或全局数据模型。微服务通常围绕业务能力或子域拆分，服务更小，由团队独立开发、部署和运维，更强调轻量通信、服务自治、服务自有数据和基础设施自动化。微服务提高局部演进和持续交付能力，但也带来服务发现、分布式事务、一致性、链路追踪和运维复杂度。
sample_answer_en: Microservices and SOA both use services, distribution, loose coupling, and reuse, but differ in granularity and governance. SOA is often enterprise-integration oriented, with larger services and more centralized governance, possibly using ESB, registries, orchestration, or global data models. Microservices are usually smaller and organized around business capabilities or subdomains, with independent team ownership, deployment, lightweight communication, service-owned data, and infrastructure automation. Microservices improve local evolution and continuous delivery but add discovery, distributed transactions, consistency, tracing, and operations complexity.

visual_hint_en: Use a comparison table or migration diagram: granularity, governance, deployment, data ownership, communication, costs.

likely_answer_pattern: SPL architecture supports multiple simultaneous variants from managed shared core assets; it manages commonality/variability and is not merely releases or reconfiguration of one product.
question_zh: 软件产品线架构和单个/简单产品架构有什么区别？
answer_zh: SPL 架构支持多个变体同时生成，管理共性和可变性，并依赖核心资产和显式 变化点；不是单个产品的版本发布或简单重配置。
sample_answer_zh: 软件产品线架构面向一组相关产品，而单个产品架构只面向一个系统。产品线架构必须显式管理共性和可变性，通过核心资产、产品线架构和变化点支持多个产品变体。它追求系统化复用和规模化定制，因此架构中要预留允许变化的范围和机制。单个产品架构只要满足该产品的功能和质量目标即可，不一定需要管理多个变体。产品线架构前期成本更高，但在多个产品间复用时能降低长期成本。
sample_answer_en: A software product line architecture serves a family of related products, while a single-product architecture serves one system. SPL explicitly manages commonality and variability through core assets, PLA, and variation points. It costs more upfront but reduces long-term cost across variants.

likely_answer_pattern: SPL reuses core assets with variation; MDA reuses platform-independent models and transformations; SOA reuses services/contracts and compositions; compare code/core-asset reuse, model reuse, and service reuse.
question_zh: 为什么 SPL、MDA、SOA 具有高复用性？比较共同点和差异。
answer_zh: SPL 复用核心资产并管理变体；MDA 复用平台无关模型和模型转换；SOA 复用服务/契约/组合。共同点是通过抽象和变化机制扩大复用范围。
sample_answer_zh: SPL、MDA 和 SOA 都通过抽象来提高复用，但复用对象不同。SPL 复用的是核心资产、产品线架构和变化机制，适合一组相似产品的系统化开发。MDA 复用的是平台无关模型和模型转换，通过 PIM 到 PSM 的映射适配不同平台。SOA 复用的是服务契约和业务服务组合，适合异构系统集成。共同点是都强调抽象、变化管理和批量定制；区别是 SPL 偏产品族和核心资产，MDA 偏模型与转换，SOA 偏运行时服务组合。
sample_answer_en: SPL, MDA, and SOA all improve reuse through abstraction, but they reuse different objects. SPL reuses core assets, product-line architecture, and variation mechanisms for a family of similar products. MDA reuses platform-independent models and model transformations, mapping PIM to PSM for different platforms. SOA reuses service contracts and business service compositions for heterogeneous system integration. Commonality: abstraction, variation management, and mass customization. Difference: SPL targets product families/core assets, MDA targets models/transformations, and SOA targets runtime service composition/integration.

SPL：复用核心资产、产品线架构和变化机制，面向一族相似产品。
MDA：复用平台无关模型和模型转换，面向多平台迁移。
SOA：复用服务契约和服务组合，面向异构系统集成。
answer_points_en: Commonality: all use abstraction and variation management to expand reuse.
SPL: reuses core assets, product-line architecture, and variation mechanisms for a family of similar products.
MDA: reuses platform-independent models and transformations for multi-platform adaptation.
SOA: reuses service contracts and service compositions for heterogeneous integration.

likely_answer_pattern: Core assets provide variation points; PLA provides the architectural basis; mechanisms include configurable components, feature models, variant management, configuration management, and binding at workspace/build/startup/runtime.
question_zh: SPL 架构如何实现可变性？描述 变化机制 与 变化点。
answer_zh: 核心资产提供 变化点，PLA 给出变化的架构基础；机制包括可配置组件、特征模型、变体管理、配置管理，以及在工作区/构建/启动/运行时绑定。
sample_answer_zh: SPL 通过变化点和变化机制实现可变性。核心资产中预留 变化点，产品线架构提供支持这些变化的结构基础；具体产品通过选择特征、配置组件、替换实现或组合服务来得到不同变体。变化可以发生在工作区创建时、构建时、部署时、启动时或运行时。绑定越晚，可修改性和灵活性通常越好，但测试组合更多、运行时复杂度更高；绑定越早，测试和控制更简单，但后续变化成本更高。
sample_answer_en: SPL implements variability through variation points and variation mechanisms. Core assets reserve variation points, and the product-line architecture provides the structural basis for supporting those variations. A concrete product selects features, configures components, replaces implementations, or composes services to derive a variant. Variation can be bound at workspace creation, build time, deployment time, startup time, or runtime. Later binding usually improves modifiability and flexibility, but creates more test combinations and higher runtime complexity; earlier binding is easier to test and control, but later change costs more.

Tradeoff: later binding is more flexible but harder to test/run; earlier binding is easier to control but more expensive to change later.

likely_answer_pattern: Explain dimensions of time, space/structure, and abstraction; later binding improves modifiability but can reduce testability, while earlier/static binding can improve testability.
question_zh: 描述软件设计中的三个变化维度，以及不同 绑定时间 对可修改性和可测试性的影响。
answer_zh: 说明时间、空间/结构、抽象三个维度。较晚绑定提升可修改性和配置灵活性，但可能降低可测试性和可预测性；较早静态绑定更易测试但变化成本更高。
sample_answer_zh: 软件变化可以从时间、空间/结构和抽象三个维度理解。绑定时间 表示某个变化点在什么时候被决定，例如编码时、编译时、部署时、启动时或运行时。较晚绑定能提高可修改性和配置灵活性，例如运行时选择支付策略或插件；但它会增加测试组合、运行时错误和性能开销。较早绑定更容易验证和优化，但当需求变化时修改成本更高。因此架构师要按质量目标选择合适绑定时间。
sample_answer_en: Change can be understood by time, space/structure, and abstraction. Binding time is when a variation is decided: coding, compile, deploy, startup, or runtime. Later binding improves flexibility but increases tests/runtime uncertainty; earlier binding is easier to verify but harder to change.

likely_answer_pattern: Draw presentation, business logic, and data access layers; assign responsibilities; document relevant views, mappings, rationale, and interfaces.
question_zh: 用三层风格设计简单 ATM 或订票系统，并用 视图及视图外信息 文档化。
answer_zh: 画 表示层、业务逻辑、数据访问 三层，分配职责；补充相关视图、视图映射、接口、设计理由和质量属性。
sample_answer_zh: 以订票系统为例，可以采用三层架构。表示层负责用户交互，包括航班查询、登录、选座和支付页面；业务逻辑层负责核心业务规则，包括库存校验、价格计算、订单创建、支付协调和取消规则；数据访问层负责访问航班、座位、订单和用户数据库，并封装持久化细节。该架构把界面、业务规则和数据访问分离，使 UI、业务规则和数据库可以相对独立修改。用 视图及视图外信息 文档化时，应给出模块视图、运行时交互视图、部署视图、接口说明和设计理由。
sample_answer_en: For a booking system, use presentation, business logic, and data access tiers. Presentation handles UI, business logic handles availability/pricing/orders/payment coordination, and data access encapsulates persistence. Document it with module, runtime, deployment views, interfaces, and rationale.

canonical_question: Analyze distributed cache updates and add components/patterns/tactics to invalidate other caches after state changes.
source_paths: raw/zqx考试复习资料/【批量下载】18年等/体系结构2015年春季2班A卷.docx

likely_answer_pattern: Add cache invalidation/update coordinator or broker/pub-sub component; commit to DB then notify other caches to invalidate/reload; for heterogeneous protocols, use connectors/adapters or web services for generic invocation.
question_zh: 分析分布式缓存更新，并添加组件/模式/战术使状态变更后其他缓存失效。
answer_zh: 增加缓存失效协调器，或采用代理模式/发布-订阅组件。更新流程是先提交数据库，再发布缓存失效事件，通知其他服务器删除或标记本地缓存过期；异构协议下用连接器/适配器或 Web 服务提供统一调用。
sample_answer_zh: 当前设计的问题是某台服务器更新本地缓存后，其他服务器缓存不会自动失效。可增加缓存失效协调器或代理组件。流程是：客户端请求服务器 A 修改业务对象；服务器 A 先提交数据库；提交成功后向协调器发布缓存失效事件；协调器通知服务器 B、服务器 C 和遗留系统的缓存适配器；各缓存删除本地对象或标记为过期；下次读取时再从数据库重新加载。若用观察者模式解释，更新源/协调器可视作主题，各缓存适配器可视作观察者。若系统协议异构，适配器或连接器把统一的失效通知接口转换成 RMI、HTTP/JSP 或 SOAP 调用。
sample_answer_en: The issue is that one server updates its local cache while other caches remain stale. Add a Cache Invalidation Coordinator/Broker. Commit the DB change first, then publish an invalidation event; the coordinator notifies cache adapters, which delete or mark entries stale and reload later. The coordinator/update source plays the Subject role and cache adapters play Observers; connectors/adapters hide RMI, HTTP/JSP, or SOAP differences.
visual_hint_zh: 缓存题参考图展示一种合理解法：用缓存失效协调器传播变更并通知其他缓存失效。
visual_hint_en: Cache invalidation is a backup question; the reference diagram shows one reasonable solution, not a core focus.

likely_answer_pattern: List concerns such as functionality, quality attributes, design/technology choices, risk management; list stakeholders such as users/customers, business owners, developers, project managers, testers, operators, regulators.
question_zh: 什么是软件架构 关注点？谁是 利益相关者？
answer_zh: 关注点是利益相关者对系统关心的问题或目标，包括功能、质量属性、技术选择、成本、进度、风险、部署、维护和合规。利益相关者包括用户/客户、业务方、开发者、测试人员、运维人员、项目经理、架构师、安全/监管人员等。
sample_answer_zh: 关注点是利益相关者对系统的关心事项，包括功能、质量属性、技术选择、成本、进度、风险、部署、维护和合规。利益相关者是会影响系统或被系统影响的人或组织，包括用户/客户、业务方、开发者、测试人员、运维人员、项目经理、架构师、安全/监管人员等。架构师要识别利益相关者关注点，并用不同视图和质量场景回应它们。
sample_answer_en: A concern is something stakeholders care about: function, quality, technology, cost, schedule, risk, deployment, maintenance, compliance. Stakeholders include users/customers, business owners, developers, testers, operators, managers, architects, security/regulators. Architecture addresses their concerns through views and scenarios.

canonical_question: Define Availability as a quality attribute, explain MTBF and MTTR, and calculate system availability.
source_paths: data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
likely_answer_pattern: Define availability as readiness for correct service; MTBF is mean time between failures, MTTR is mean time to repair; availability can be estimated as MTBF / (MTBF + MTTR) or uptime / total time.
question_zh: 定义可用性，解释 MTBF/MTTR，并计算系统可用性。
answer_zh: 可用性表示系统在需要时可正确提供服务的概率或时间比例。MTBF 是平均无故障时间，MTTR 是平均修复时间。常用计算为：可用性 = MTBF / (MTBF + MTTR)，也可写成正常运行时间 / (正常运行时间 + 停机时间)。
sample_answer_zh: 可用性是系统在被请求时能够提供正确服务的程度，常用 SLA 百分比表达。MTBF 是平均无故障时间，即两次故障之间的平均时间；MTTR 是平均修复时间，即平均恢复服务所需时间。若用概率近似，系统可用性 = MTBF / (MTBF + MTTR)，也就是正常运行时间占正常运行时间与停机修复时间之和的比例。提高可用性可以通过故障检测、冗余、故障转移和快速恢复，但会增加成本和复杂度。
sample_answer_en: Availability is the probability or proportion of time that the system delivers correct service when needed. MTBF means Mean Time Between Failures and MTTR means Mean Time To Repair. A common estimate is Availability = MTBF / (MTBF + MTTR), or uptime divided by uptime plus downtime. Tactics include fault detection, redundancy, failover, and recovery, with cost and complexity tradeoffs.
priority_reason_zh: 非 核心考点的补充掌握；理解到能识别和简答即可。

canonical_question: What is a software pattern, and can patterns provide software architecture?
source_paths: data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 3: Architectural Patterns - 软件架构模式.txt
data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
likely_answer_pattern: Distinguish architectural patterns/styles from GoF design patterns; patterns can provide reusable architectural skeletons when they organize system-level elements, connectors, constraints, and quality tradeoffs.
question_zh: 软件模式是什么？模式能提供架构吗？
answer_zh: 模式是对反复出现问题及其解决方案的抽象。架构模式可以提供架构骨架，因为它规定系统级元素、连接件、约束和质量取舍；GoF 设计模式主要是类/对象协作，不能直接等同于软件体系结构。
sample_answer_zh: 软件模式是对反复出现的上下文、问题和解决方案的命名抽象。能否提供架构取决于粒度：分层、代理模式、管道-过滤器、SOA 等架构模式/风格会组织系统级组件、连接件、约束和质量取舍，因此可以作为架构骨架；工厂模式、命令模式等 GoF 模式主要解决类和对象协作问题，只能作为局部设计手段，不能直接替代软件架构。
sample_answer_en: A software pattern is a named abstraction of a recurring context, problem, and solution. Architectural patterns/styles such as Layered, Broker, Pipe-and-Filter, and SOA can provide an architecture skeleton because they organize system-level elements, connectors, constraints, and quality tradeoffs. GoF patterns are mostly local class/object collaboration mechanisms.

canonical_question: Why are design decisions important to software architecture? Explain “architecture = design structure plus design decisions”.
source_paths: raw/老师复习大纲（答案方式）.docx
data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
likely_answer_pattern: Architecture is not only structure; significant decisions explain why elements, connectors, constraints, technology choices, and tradeoffs are selected and how they affect qualities and evolution.
question_zh: 为什么设计决定对架构重要？如何理解“软件架构 = 设计结构 + 设计决定”？
answer_zh: 结构描述组件和连接关系，设计决定说明为什么这样组织、选择了哪些约束/技术/职责/接口，以及这些选择对质量属性和演化的影响。没有设计决定，架构图只能说明“是什么”，无法说明“为什么”和“后续如何变”。
sample_answer_zh: 设计决定重要，因为架构的价值不只在组件-连接器结构，还在早期关键选择及其理由。结构图能说明系统有哪些元素、怎样连接；设计决定记录职责分配、协调模型、数据模型、资源管理、元素映射、绑定时机和技术选择，并解释这些决定怎样满足 ASR、带来哪些风险和权衡。这样架构才能被评审、沟通和演化。
sample_answer_en: Design decisions matter because architecture is more than a component-and-connector structure. The structure says what elements exist and how they interact; decisions record responsibility allocation, coordination, data, resources, mapping, binding time, technology choices, rationale, risks, and tradeoffs. This makes architecture reviewable, communicable, and evolvable.

canonical_question: What is the nature of component-and-connector style? Explain with SOA as an example.
source_paths: data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 3: Architectural Patterns - 软件架构模式.txt
data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 14: Course Review - 3 - 课程复习.txt
likely_answer_pattern: C&C styles describe runtime components and connectors; SOA uses services as components and service contracts/protocols/ESB or messaging as connectors to support interoperability and reuse.
question_zh: 组件-连接器样式的本质是什么？以 SOA 为例说明。
answer_zh: C&C 样式关注运行时组件、连接件和交互约束。SOA 中服务是组件，服务契约、消息协议、ESB/服务总线或 API 调用是连接件，用来支持跨系统互操作、复用和松耦合，但会引入网络开销、治理和版本兼容问题。
sample_answer_zh: 组件-连接器 风格 的本质是描述系统运行时有哪些组件、它们通过哪些连接件交互，以及交互受到什么约束。以 SOA 为例，独立服务承担业务能力，服务契约定义可调用接口，HTTP/SOAP/消息队列/ESB 等承担连接件角色。它提升互操作性、复用和组织间集成能力，但会带来远程调用开销、治理复杂度和服务版本兼容问题。
sample_answer_en: A C&C style describes runtime components, connectors, and interaction constraints. In SOA, services are components, service contracts define interfaces, and HTTP/SOAP/messaging/ESB act as connectors. SOA improves interoperability and reuse, but adds remote-call overhead, governance complexity, and versioning issues.

canonical_question: Design a Pipe-and-Filter text processing architecture that outputs sorted unique words from an input text file.
source_paths: data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 3: Architectural Patterns - 软件架构模式.txt
likely_answer_pattern: Model each transformation as a filter and each data stream as a pipe; example filters: read file, tokenize, normalize, remove duplicates, sort, write output; explain component responsibilities and mapping.
question_zh: 设计一个 管道-过滤器 文本处理架构：输入文本文件，输出排序后的无重复单词列表。
answer_zh: 把每个转换步骤建成过滤器，把数据流建成管道。典型链路是：文件读取器 -> 分词器 -> 规范化器 -> 去重器 -> 排序器 -> 输出器。答题重点是组件职责、连接器数据格式和图/实现映射；代码实现部分属于相邻课程详细设计，复习时降权。
sample_answer_zh: 可以设计为一条管道-过滤器流水线：文件读取器从文件读取字符流，分词器将文本拆成单词，规范化器统一大小写并去除标点，去重器用集合过滤重复词，排序器排序，输出器输出结果。每个管道只传递约定格式的数据，过滤器之间不共享内部状态。这样做的优点是步骤清晰、可复用、可替换；限制是对强交互、共享状态或需要全局回看的任务不够自然。
sample_answer_en: Use a Pipe-and-Filter pipeline: FileReader reads the text stream, Tokenizer splits words, Normalizer lowercases and removes punctuation, DuplicateRemover filters duplicates, Sorter orders the words, and Writer outputs the result. Pipes carry agreed data formats and filters avoid shared state. This improves reuse and replaceability, but is weak for highly interactive or shared-state tasks.

canonical_question: Describe operability and performance quality attribute scenarios.
question_zh: 如何描述可操作性和性能的质量属性场景？
source_paths: raw/老师复习大纲（答案方式）.docx
data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
likely_answer_pattern: Use the same six-part scenario template. For operability, focus on operator actions, diagnosis, configuration, rollback, or monitoring. For performance, focus on workload, latency/throughput, and measurable response time.
question_en: Describe operability and performance quality-attribute scenarios.
answer_zh: 仍用六要素模板。可操作性写操作者在某环境下执行诊断、配置、回滚或监控操作，系统给出可理解、可执行的响应，并用完成时间/错误率/恢复时间度量。性能写用户或外部系统在峰值/正常负载下发起请求，目标制品在限定延迟、吞吐或资源占用内响应。
sample_answer_zh: 这类题仍然用六要素模板；下面数值是可替换示例，考场按题干约束调整。可操作性示例：刺激源是运维人员；刺激是在正常运行环境下收到故障告警并执行诊断/回滚；制品是监控控制台和目标服务；响应是展示日志、指标、链路和依赖状态，并允许执行回滚；响应度量可写“在限定时间内定位并完成操作，且不影响已完成业务”。性能示例：刺激源是用户或外部系统；刺激是在峰值负载下发起请求；制品是目标服务/接口（API）；环境是正常运行或高峰期；响应是完成处理并返回结果；响应度量写延迟、吞吐、错误率或资源占用阈值。
sample_answer_en: Use the same six-part template; do not treat the following numbers or scenario details as fixed source wording. For operability: the source is an operator; the stimulus is a diagnosis/configuration/rollback action after an alarm during normal operation; the artifact is the console and target service; the response is showing logs, metrics, traces, dependencies, and allowing the operation; measures include bounded diagnosis/operation time and no disruption to completed business. For performance: the source is a user or external system; the stimulus is a request under normal or peak load; the artifact is the target service/API; the response is processing and returning the result; measures are latency, throughput, error rate, or resource usage.
visual_hint_zh: 两个场景都画同一张六要素图，只是刺激源、刺激、制品、响应度量换成“运维操作”和“高并发请求”。
visual_hint_en: Use the same six-part diagram for both; change the source, stimulus, artifact, and response measure for operator action vs high-load request.
source_audit_zh: 六要素模板来自复习课；可操作性/性能组合来自 2025 相邻材料，具体数值已改为示范性表达而非原题标准。
source_audit_en: Six-part template is review-class core; operability/performance pairing is 2025 adjacent material. Concrete numbers are now illustrative, not fixed source wording.

canonical_question: Describe the main characteristics of microservice architecture.
question_zh: 说明微服务架构的主要特征。
source_paths: raw/老师复习大纲（答案方式）.docx
data/复习课完整录音-张贺吕骏李杉杉.txt
data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 14: Course Review - 3 - 课程复习.txt
data/extracted/slides/slides__Lecture 3: Architectural Patterns - 软件架构模式.txt
likely_answer_pattern: State microservices as small independently deployable services organized around business capabilities, with service autonomy, decentralized governance/data, lightweight communication, and automated infrastructure; finish with distributed-system tradeoffs.
question_en: Describe the main characteristics of microservice architecture.
answer_zh: 微服务把单体应用拆成围绕业务能力组织的小服务。每个服务可独立开发、测试、部署和扩展，服务之间通过轻量通信协作；团队和技术治理更去中心化，服务通常拥有自己的数据边界，并依赖持续集成/持续交付、容器、服务发现、监控和链路追踪等自动化基础设施。代价是网络失败、分布式事务、一致性和运维复杂度上升。
sample_answer_zh: 微服务架构的主要特征可以背六点：第一，通过服务组件化，把业务能力封装为可独立替换和升级的服务；第二，围绕业务能力组织团队和系统边界；第三，高内聚低耦合，服务内部保有自己的领域逻辑，服务间减少直接依赖；第四，去中心化治理和数据管理，不同服务可选不同技术栈并拥有自己的数据库；第五，基础设施自动化，通过持续集成/持续交付、容器、服务发现、监控等支撑频繁交付；第六，服务设计与演进，允许服务独立演进并通过高可用设计容忍失败。
sample_answer_en: The main characteristics of microservice architecture can be memorized in six points. First, services componentize business capabilities, so each capability becomes a service that can be replaced or upgraded independently. Second, teams and system boundaries are organized around business capabilities. Third, services are highly cohesive and loosely coupled: each service keeps its own domain logic, and direct dependencies between services are reduced. Fourth, governance and data management are decentralized: different services may choose suitable technology stacks and usually own their own databases. Fifth, infrastructure is automated through CI/CD, containers, service discovery, monitoring, and tracing to support frequent delivery. Sixth, services are designed to evolve independently and tolerate failures through resilient design.
visual_hint_zh: 可画成“业务能力 -> 服务边界 -> 独立部署/自有数据库/自动化平台”的三层图。
visual_hint_en: Draw business capabilities mapped to service boundaries, each with independent deployment, owned data, and automation support.

每个服务旁写独立开发、测试、部署、扩展。
图下补代价：网络失败、分布式事务、一致性和运维复杂度。

answer_points_zh: 服务组件化：把业务能力封装为可独立替换和升级的服务。
围绕业务能力组织：系统边界和团队边界都尽量按业务能力划分。
高内聚低耦合：服务内部保有领域逻辑，服务间减少直接依赖。
去中心化治理和数据：不同服务可选技术栈，并拥有自己的数据库/数据边界。
基础设施自动化：依赖持续集成/持续交付、容器、服务发现、监控和链路追踪。
独立演进与容错：服务可独立演进，并通过高可用设计容忍局部失败。
answer_points_en: Componentization via services: package each business capability as a service that can be replaced or upgraded independently.
Organization around business capabilities: align service boundaries and team boundaries with business capabilities.
High cohesion and loose coupling: keep domain logic inside the service and reduce direct dependencies between services.
Decentralized governance and data: services may choose suitable technology stacks and usually own their own databases/data boundaries.
Infrastructure automation: rely on CI/CD, containers, service discovery, monitoring, and tracing for frequent delivery.
Independent evolution and resilience: services evolve independently and tolerate local failures through resilient design.

Concrete service names and Saga/events are an illustrative decomposition, not mandatory source wording.
question_en: Design a food-delivery platform using microservices and explain the service decomposition.
answer_zh: 先说明外卖平台业务域多、流量峰值明显、团队可按业务能力并行演进，因此适合微服务。再从动词识别系统操作：浏览菜单、下单、支付、接单、配送、通知、结算。服务可示例拆为用户、商家/菜单、订单、支付、配送调度、通知、结算/评价等。每个服务拥有自己的数据，跨服务可用同步 API 或异步事件协作；如果涉及跨服务一致性，再补最终一致性和补偿策略。
sample_answer_zh: 示例答案：外卖平台适合微服务，因为用户、商家、菜单、订单、支付、骑手调度和通知属于不同业务能力，访问压力和变化频率也不同，可以独立扩展和迭代。系统操作包括浏览餐厅和菜单、创建订单、支付订单、商家接单、分配骑手、更新配送状态、发送通知和结算。一个合理拆分是用户服务、商家/菜单服务、订单服务、支付服务、配送/调度服务、通知服务和结算服务。每个服务拥有自己的数据，用户请求通过 API 网关进入，订单、支付、配送之间可用事件协作和 Saga/补偿保证最终一致性。
sample_answer_en: Illustrative answer: a food-delivery platform fits microservices because user, restaurant/menu, order, payment, delivery, notification, and settlement capabilities evolve and scale differently. Map operations to services: browse menus, create order, pay, accept order, dispatch rider, update delivery, notify, and settle. A reasonable split is User, Restaurant/Menu, Order, Payment, Delivery/Dispatch, Notification, and Settlement services. Each owns its data boundary; requests may enter through an API Gateway; services coordinate through synchronous APIs or asynchronous events. If the question asks about consistency, add eventual consistency, Saga, or compensation, but these are example design mechanisms rather than fixed wording in the question.
visual_hint_zh: 先用四组模式组织答题：拆分服务边界，再补通信、部署和可观测性；具体服务图可参考微服务拆分图。
visual_hint_en: Use the four pattern groups first: decompose service boundaries, then add communication, deployment, and observability; use the decomposition diagram for concrete service layout.

每个服务画独立数据边界；用户请求从 API 网关进入。

drawing_steps_en: Identify services from verbs/business capabilities: user, restaurant/menu, order, payment, delivery/dispatch, notification, settlement/review.
Draw a separate data boundary for each service; route user requests through an API Gateway.
Connect order, payment, and delivery using synchronous APIs or asynchronous events; add Saga/compensation only as an illustrative consistency mechanism.
Write quality tradeoffs below: independent scaling/evolution vs distributed consistency and operational complexity.

likely_answer_pattern: Answer by six parts: definition; core idea of structures, relationships, and principles; 4A; TOGAF ADM and CBM; modeling methods; value and scenarios. Keep case details light; focus on the six-part EA answer structure.
question_zh: 解释企业架构：它是什么，核心思想是什么，4A、TOGAF/ADM、CBM、价值和适用场景分别怎么答？
answer_zh: 按六段答：1. 企业架构是具有共同目标的组织集合体的基本组成部分，以及其内外部关系、设计原则和治理原则。2. 基本组成部分不是空泛说法，可按 4A 展开：业务层有客户、产品、渠道策略、流程、业务组件；数据层有逻辑/物理数据资产、标准、责任；应用层有应用蓝图、组件化设计、共享服务；技术层有技术组件、基础设施、标准化和自监控/自恢复。3. 内外部关系可写成企业战略和愿景分解为战略能力、价值链、业务领域，再由流程和数据模型推导业务组件，业务组件再由应用、服务、平台和技术基础设施实现，同时连接客户、员工、渠道、监管、遗留系统和运行环境。4. TOGAF 的核心是 ADM 架构开发周期，CBM 以业务能力为核心、业务组件为能力载体。5. 建模方法包括五级流程、标准动词库、5W1H、A/B/C/D 分层数据设计、流程+数据聚类。6. 价值是解决孤岛和协作问题，推动标准化、业务再造和战略落地，适合复杂企业级系统、跨部门协同和遗留系统治理。
sample_answer_zh: 企业架构描述一个具有共同目标的组织集合体由哪些基本部分组成，以及这些部分之间的内外部关系、设计原则和治理原则。这里的“基本组成部分”可以用 4A 具体化：业务架构包括客户、产品、渠道策略、业务流程和业务组件；数据架构包括逻辑/物理数据资产、数据标准和数据责任；应用架构包括应用蓝图、组件化设计和服务共享；技术架构包括技术组件、基础设施、标准化，以及运行层面的自监控和自恢复能力。“内外部关系”不是一句空话，可以写成从企业愿景和战略出发，分解出战略能力、价值链和业务领域，再通过业务流程和数据模型推导业务组件，业务组件再被应用组件、共享服务、业务平台和技术基础设施实现；同时还要面向客户、员工、渠道、监管要求、遗留系统和运行环境。它的核心因此可以概括为找结构、找关系、定原则：找结构是识别能力、流程、数据、应用和技术；找关系是说明它们如何依赖、协作和被实现；定原则是用标准化、组件化、共享复用、高内聚低耦合和架构治理机制控制变化。方法上，TOGAF 的核心是 ADM 迭代周期，CBM 以业务能力为核心，把业务组件作为能力载体。建模时用五级流程和标准动词库统一业务行为，用 5W1H 识别业务对象，用 A/B/C/D 分层设计数据，再通过流程任务和数据实体聚类推导业务组件。企业架构的根本价值是解决系统孤岛和协作问题，其次是标准化、业务再造和战略落地，适合业务复杂、系统规模大、跨部门协同强或遗留系统较多的企业级项目。
sample_answer_en: Enterprise architecture describes the basic components of an organization with a common goal, plus the internal/external relationships, design principles, and governance principles among those components. The “basic components” can be made concrete through 4A: Business Architecture includes customers, products, channel strategy, business processes, and business components; Data Architecture includes logical/physical data assets, data standards, and data responsibilities; Application Architecture includes application blueprints, componentized design, and shared services; Technology Architecture includes technical components, infrastructure, standardization, and runtime self-monitoring/self-recovery. The “relationships” can be written as a chain: enterprise vision and strategy are decomposed into strategic capabilities, value chains, and business domains; business processes and data models derive business components; business components are implemented by application components, shared services, business platforms, and technical infrastructure; externally, the architecture connects to customers, employees, channels, regulatory requirements, legacy systems, and runtime environments. Therefore the core is identifying structures, identifying relationships, and setting principles: structures are capabilities/processes/data/applications/technologies; relationships explain dependency, collaboration, and implementation; principles control change through standardization, componentization, sharing/reuse, high cohesion and low coupling, and architecture governance. TOGAF centers on the ADM cycle, while CBM centers on business capabilities and uses business components as capability carriers. Modeling methods include five-level processes, a standard verb library, 5W1H for business objects, A/B/C/D layered data design, and process + data clustering to derive business components. The main value is solving silos and collaboration problems, then supporting standardization, business reengineering, and strategy execution in complex enterprise projects.
answer_points_zh: 定义：企业架构描述组织集合体的基本组成部分、内外部关系、设计原则和治理原则。
基本组成部分：用 4A 展开，业务=客户/产品/渠道/流程/业务组件，数据=数据资产/标准/责任，应用=应用蓝图/组件/共享服务，技术=技术组件/基础设施/标准化。
内外部关系：战略/愿景 -> 战略能力/价值链/业务领域 -> 流程和数据模型 -> 业务组件 -> 应用/服务/平台/基础设施；外部连接客户、员工、渠道、监管、遗留系统和运行环境。
设计/治理原则：标准化、组件化、共享复用、高内聚低耦合、架构委员会/存储库/变更治理、持续演进。
TOGAF/ADM：说明架构开发和治理的迭代过程。
CBM：业务能力为核心，业务组件为能力载体，高内聚、低耦合、可复用、可组装。
建模：五级流程、标准动词库、5W1H、A/B/C/D、流程+数据聚类。
价值/场景：孤岛、协作、标准化、业务再造、战略落地；复杂企业、跨部门、遗留系统。
answer_points_en: Definition: Enterprise Architecture describes the basic components of an organizational whole with a common goal, plus their internal/external relationships and design/governance principles.

Basic components through 4A: Business = customers/products/channels/processes/business components; Data = data assets/standards/responsibilities; Application = application blueprint/components/shared services; Technology = technology components/infrastructure/standardization/self-monitoring and self-recovery.

Internal/external relationships: strategy/vision -> strategic capabilities/value chains/business domains -> processes and data models -> business components -> applications/services/platforms/infrastructure; externally connect customers, employees, channels, regulation, legacy systems, and runtime environments.
Design/governance principles: standardization, componentization, sharing/reuse, high cohesion and low coupling, architecture board/repository/change governance, and continuous evolution.
TOGAF/ADM: explain architecture development and governance as an iterative cycle.
CBM: business capability is the core; business components are capability carriers that should be cohesive, loosely coupled, reusable, and composable.
Modeling: five-level processes, standard verb library, 5W1H, A/B/C/D layered data design, and process + data clustering.

Value/scenarios: solve silos and collaboration problems; support standardization, business reengineering, and strategy execution; fit complex enterprises, cross-department collaboration, and legacy-system governance.

visual_hint_zh: 企业架构题若让画图，可画左侧 ADM 周期、右侧 CBM 能力到组件的映射。
visual_hint_en: If an EA question asks for a diagram, draw ADM cycle on the left and CBM capability-to-component mapping on the right.
drawing_steps_zh: 左侧画 TOGAF/ADM 周期：预备、愿景、业务、信息系统、技术、机会方案、迁移、治理、变更管理，中心写需求管理。
右侧画 CBM：业务能力在上，业务组件在下，旁边标高内聚、低耦合、可复用、可组装。
底部补建模输入：流程聚类 + 数据聚类。
drawing_steps_en: Draw the TOGAF/ADM cycle on the left: preliminary, vision, business, information systems, technology, opportunities, migration, governance, change management, with requirements management in the center.
Draw CBM on the right: business capability above business components, annotated with cohesive, loosely coupled, reusable, composable.
Add modeling inputs at the bottom: process clustering plus data clustering.
